full_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram

facts: IIITDM Kancheepuram is located at Melakottaiyur, off Kelambakkam-Vandalur Road, Kandigai, Nellikuppam, Tamil Nadu - 600127.
An Institution of National Importance under MoE, Government of India.
Some hostel blocks are under construction.
Akshara Mess serves both girls and boys.

one_time_fees.includes: Admission Rs 500, Certificate Rs 500, Student Welfare Rs 1000, Infrastructure Development Rs 1000, Alumni Rs 500, Library Rs 1000, Cultural Rs 500

notes: SC/ST/PwD students exempted from tuition fee for 4 years.
Hostel is compulsory for all students.
General/OBC/EWS income below Rs 1 lakh: full tuition remission.
General/OBC/EWS income Rs 1-5 lakh: 2/3rd tuition remission.
Dining charges may vary based on tendering. Additional Rs 5000 for special menu items.

facts: WiFi recently being installed in hostel corridors.
Some halls in academic block have WiFi.
In case of health issues, 75% is acceptable with certificate verified by IIITDM doctor.
Washing machines on hostel ground floors.
Gym available — Rs 500 per month for everyone.

medical.note: Not mentioned by ambassador — data gap.

facts: Bus 515B drops at Kandigai bus stop, then 1 km walk to campus.

language_climate.language: Tamil, English. Mostly Telugu-speaking student population.
